ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the flight schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the flight schedule */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days of the week the flight operates */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Total flight duration */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Total seating capacity of the flight */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., IATA code) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight route */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the flight route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any changes to the flight schedule */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time after updates */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time after updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_operations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "num_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the booking */,
  "booking_class" TEXT /* Class of the booking (e.g., economy, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem rewards */,
  "reward_details" TEXT /* Details of the rewards offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight schedule */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delayed flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_maintenance_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
